data.title: Law firm investigating data breach at Family & Community Services Inc. in Ohio. Customers' data compromised. Date: Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Portage County, Ohio, the law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP has initiated an investigation into data privacy allegations concerning a hacking incident at Family & Community Services Inc ("Family & Community Services"). The organization became aware of a data breach around that time and is actively reviewing the situation. The firm is looking into the matter to determine the extent of the breach and any potential impact on the information compromised.

data.title: NBA player Kevin Durant regains control of his Coinbase account after almost 10 years, CEO confirms.
data.description: After approximately ten years of being unable to access his Coinbase account, NBA athlete Kevin Durant has regained control of his Bitcoin assets. This development was confirmed by the CEO of the exchange platform.

data.title: Remilia introduces Milady Social Network for '4chan diaspora,' catering to a community disillusioned by the current web.
data.description: Remilia Corporation will be launching a new social media platform exclusively for the Milady community, aiming to address concerns about the current state of the internet. This decision comes amidst growing dissatisfaction with existing platforms and a desire for more tailored online experiences. With the new network, users can expect a more focused space for interaction and engagement. This move reflects the corporation's commitment to catering to the specific needs of the Milady community, which boasts a significant number of members. The platform is set to offer a range of features and functionalities to enhance the online experience for this demographic.

data.title: CASEKOO sells over 1.27 million Magic Stand Cases in the US since 2021, showing strong market success.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, CASEKOO, a renowned company specializing in premium smartphone protective accessories, revealed that they have sold more than 1.27 million units of their Magic Stand Case in the United States since its launch in 2021. This impressive sales achievement was fueled by the innovative features and high-quality design of the product, establishing CASEKOO as a leader in the industry.
Trump: Going to have news conference next week on autism, it's out of control

data.title: Faraday Future invests $41 million in Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. for crypto business via PIPE transaction.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) and Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) disclosed a partnership agreement for a private investment in public equity (PIPE) in QLGN’s common stock and preferred stock. Faraday Future, a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, and QLGN will also commence operations in the Crypto and web3 space. This collaboration marks an important milestone for both companies and signifies their entrance into new ventures.

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust will disburse $1.6B to creditors in September, part of a total $16.5B being distributed.
data.description: The third payment to former exchange creditors has been distributed, with a total of $16.5 billion to be dispersed as part of ongoing payouts.

data.title: Reynolds Consumer Products (NASD: REYN) to replace SpartanNash Co. (NASD: SPTN) in S&P SmallCap 600 on Sept 24. Acquisition by C&S Wholesale Grocers LLC.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (NASD: REYN) is set to take the place of SpartanNash Co. (NASD: SPTN) in the S&P SmallCap 600. This change will be implemented before trading begins on Wednesday, September 24. C&S Wholesale Grocers LLC is in the process of acquiring SpartanNash in a significant deal.

data.title: RedSwan CRE teams up with Stellar (XLM) for tokenizing real estate, enhancing investment opportunities for investors worldwide.
data.description: RedSwan Commercial Real Estate has formed a partnership with Stellar, a cryptocurrency, to innovate real estate investment by tokenizing assets. This strategic alliance aims to enhance accessibility and flexibility for investors worldwide. The partnership is set to transform the real estate sector by leveraging blockchain technology to tokenize assets, making it easier for investors to participate. Integration with Stellar's platform will facilitate seamless transactions and provide a secure environment for users. This collaboration signals a significant advancement in the real estate industry, opening up new opportunities for global investors.

data.title: Investors exit Bitcoin as Solana gains $1B treasury co, and Crypto ETFs launch amidst Alt Autumn. Major moves in digital assets.
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange traded funds (ETFs) are quickly being introduced to the market, along with significant developments in the digital asset space. Solana, a popular blockchain platform, recently secured its first treasury company with assets valued at $1 billion in just one week. This week has seen major movements and advancements within the digital asset industry, highlighting the growing importance and adoption of cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Xcite Resources plans to offer brokered life shares and flow-through private placement, amending agreements for Athabasca Uranium Portfolio.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 4.2%. This significant decrease has resulted in a total of 300,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy grew by 3.5% in the same period, indicating a positive trend in overall economic performance. The government has credited various policy initiatives for this upturn in job creation and economic growth. Despite this positive development, experts caution that certain sectors are still facing challenges, particularly the manufacturing industry which saw a decline of 2% in job opportunities. However, overall, the outlook appears optimistic as the country continues to make progress in addressing unemployment and bolstering economic stability.

data.title: US Treasury seeks feedback for Genius Act. US President Trump signed the bill in July; regulations pending for stablecoin rules.
data.description: In July, US President Donald Trump signed into law a bill that sets guidelines for the payment of stablecoins. The legislation is now pending final regulations before it can be put into effect.

data.title: RealPage settles revenue management software dispute with Nevada AG. (Character count: 77)
data.description: RealPage, based in Richardson, Texas, has come to an agreement with the Nevada Attorney General regarding revenue management software. The settlement, which involves an undisclosed amount of revenue, signifies the resolution of any related issues between the company and the state of Nevada. This development underscores RealPage's commitment to compliance with legal regulations and willingness to address concerns raised by authorities. The terms of the settlement were not disclosed in the news release.

data.title: ABRDN Japan Equity Fund (JEQ) to pay final $0.6944 per share cash distribution on Oct 7, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, abrdn Japan Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: JEQ) declared a cash distribution of $0.6944 per share, scheduled for payment on October 7, 2025. This distribution marks the conclusion of long-term realized gains and net investment income allocation by the fund.

data.title: CFTC appoints leaders from Uniswap, Aptos, BNY, Chainlink, JP Morgan, and Franklin Templeton to digital asset group.
data.description: Executives from Uniswap, Aptos, BNY Mellon, Chainlink, JP Morgan, and Franklin Templeton have been appointed to the Digital Asset Markets Subcommittee by the CFTC, led by Acting Chair Pham. This move brings high-profile representation to the subcommittee, which will focus on digital asset market regulation and oversight. Key industry figures from these prominent companies will contribute their expertise to navigate the evolving landscape of digital assets within the CFTC, underscoring the importance of collaboration between regulatory bodies and industry leaders in ensuring market integrity and investor protection.
Reynolds Consumer Products Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600

data.title: Arthur Levine named President of Brandeis University on Sept. 16, unveiling a new liberal arts model for career development.
data.description: Brandeis University in Waltham, Mass., revealed its new liberal arts model centering on career advancement on Sept. 16, 2025. Arthur Levine was officially named the university's president during a ceremony held at the Gorman Athletic Center. This initiative marks a significant shift in the traditional higher education approach.
